claims.quote: Knight Foundation Fellowship in Healthcare Technology Innovation - Through the generous support of the John S. and James L. Knight Foundation, Baptist Health Innovations has launched the Knight Foundation Fellowship for Healthcare Technology Innovation. This competitive fellowship is designed to attract, train and empower healthcare visionaries and entrepreneurs to develop a diverse and connected community of innovators at Baptist Health and in South Florida.
claims.claimText: Baptist Health Innovations runs the Knight Foundation Fellowship in Healthcare Technology Innovation — an entrepreneurship/innovation fellowship, not a clinical/GME fellowship.
claims.limitations: Innovation/entrepreneurship fellowship, not ACGME clinical fellowship; audience and eligibility not stated. System-level scope, not campus-specific.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Fellowship targets healthcare visionaries/entrepreneurs for technology innovation, not medical students, residents, fellows, or attending clinical practice; does not map cleanly onto USCEHub Tiers 1–3.
claims.visibilityRationale: source scope HEALTH_SYSTEM_LEVEL cannot prove campus-specific availability without campusApplicabilityProof

claims.quote: The Baptist Health South Florida Athletic Training – Orthopedic Residency is a one-year intensive program providing Athletic Trainers with advanced training orthopedic sports medicine and arthroscopic surgery.

claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Page describes a post-graduate one-year residency program (allied health athletic training), placing it in the trainee tier.
